'''sakïfngïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yabby|yabby]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yabby|yabby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| sakïfngïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || sakïfngïfth || sakïfngïfj || sakïfngïfsh || sakïfngïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || sakïfkïfngïfth || sakïfkïfngïfj || sakïfkïfngïfsh || sakïfkïfngïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sakïfngïfïf || sakïfngïfïf || sakïfngïfïf || sakïfngïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || sakïfngïfth || sakïfngïfj || sakïfngïfsh || sakïfngïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sakïfngïfïfl || sakïfngïfïfl || sakïfngïfïfl || sakïfngïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sakïfngïfïfïf || sakïfngïfïfïf || sakïfngïfïfïf || sakïfngïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || sakïfngïfïfn || sakïfngïfïfn || sakïfngïfïfn || sakïfngïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sakïfngïfïforo || sakïfngïfïforo || sakïfngïfïforo || sakïfngïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|086b4c8}}
